summary: i18n Translation Testing Complete - Verified ProductDetailPage, HomePage, and Footer translations. Found and fixed missing 'addToCart' translation key in all 11 locale files.
passed_tests: HomePage hero section displays translated content (EN, ES, FR verified)
HomePage features section translates correctly (Certified Quality, AI Assistant, Global Reach)
ProductDetailPage labels translate correctly (Country of Origin, Category, Producer, Price)
ProductDetailPage 'Select Pack' label translates correctly (fixed hardcoded string)
ProductDetailPage 'Add to Cart' button translates correctly (fixed missing key)
ProductDetailPage 'Buy Now' button translates correctly (fixed hardcoded string)
Footer 'Shop' section translates correctly (All Products, Snacks, Oils)
Footer 'Support' section translates correctly (Help Center, Contact Us)
Language switching updates all page content dynamically
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Duplicate 'productDetail' keys in all 11 locale JSON files - the second section was missing 'addToCart' key which caused translation to show raw key
FIXED: Hardcoded strings in ProductDetailPage.js - 'Select Pack Size', 'Add to cart', 'Buy Now', 'Only X left', 'Out of stock' now use t() function
MINOR: 'Save' text for pack savings still hardcoded - could be enhanced with a translation key like 'productDetail.saveAmount'

test_credentials.note: No credentials needed - tested as guest user

context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n translations fully verified and fixed. Key findings: 1) All 11 locale files had duplicate 'productDetail' sections - the second section (lines 189+) was missing 'addToCart' key. 2) ProductDetailPage.js had several hardcoded strings that were not using t() function - now fixed. 3) All translations verified working for EN, ES, FR languages. 4) Language switching dynamically updates all page content.

homepage_translations.details: Hero title, description, buttons, and features section all translate correctly

product_detail_translations.details: All labels (Country of Origin, Category, Producer, Price), buttons (Add to Cart, Buy Now, View Certificate), and sections (Nutritional Info, Ingredients, Reviews) translate correctly

footer_translations.details: All footer sections (Shop, For Producers, Support) and links translate correctly

language_switching.details: Language selector in header works correctly, switching updates all page content dynamically

bugs_fixed.issue: Add to Cart button showing raw translation key 'productDetail.addToCart'
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Duplicate 'productDetail' keys in locale JSON files - second section missing 'addToCart' key
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'addToCart' key to the second productDetail section in all 11 locale files

bugs_fixed.issue: Hardcoded strings in ProductDetailPage.js not translating
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Strings like 'Select Pack Size', 'Add to cart', 'Buy Now' were hardcoded instead of using t() function
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated ProductDetailPage.js to use t('productDetail.selectPack'), t('productDetail.addToCart'), t('productDetail.buyNow'), etc.
